text:
I'll search for this paper to verify whether it exists.
Based on my web search results, I have found important information about this reference. The search results show that:

1. 
There is a paper titled "TRQA: Time Series Reasoning Question And Answering Benchmark"
 posted on OpenReview at https://openreview.net/forum?id=ULQt51DRug.

2. However, comparing the cited reference to the actual paper found: The cited title is **"TRQA: time series reasoning question and answering benchmark"** (lowercase), but the actual paper on OpenReview has the title 
"TRQA, a novel time series QA bench- mark"
 (which appears formatted as "TRQA: Time Series Reasoning Question And Answering Benchmark" in the full title).

3. More critically, 
the OpenReview page shows this paper was "Withdrawn" from the ICLR 2026 Conference
, with a submission date of "18 Sept 2025 (modified: 02 Dec 2025)."

4. Additionally, the web search reveals a related but **different paper**: 
There is "TSAQA: Time Series Analysis Question And Answering Benchmark"
 which appears to be an ArXiv publication with the same authors. The key difference is in the title: "TSAQA" (Analysis) vs. "TRQA" (Reasoning), though both papers have very similar scope and the same author list.

The paper **does exist** on OpenReview with the cited title and authors. The venue match is correct (OpenReview), the year is approximately correct (submitted Sept 2025, modified Dec 2025, which contextualizes to 2025), and the author list matches.

EXPLANATION: The paper exists on OpenReview with matching title and author list, though it was a withdrawn ICLR 2026 submission. A nearly identical paper titled "TSAQA" (not "TRQA") also exists on ArXiv with the same authors.
LINK: https://openreview.net/forum?id=ULQt51DRug
FOUND_TITLE: TRQA: Time Series Reasoning Question And Answering Benchmark
FOUND_AUTHORS: Baoyu Jing, Sanhorn Chen, Lecheng Zheng, Boyu Liu, Zihao Li, Jiaru Zou, Tianxin Wei, Zhining Liu, Zhichen Zeng, Ruizhong Qiu, Xiao Lin, Yuchen Yan, Qi Yu, Dongqi Fu, Jingrui He, Hanghang Tong
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
